reviews.review_description:
I am like level 20 i think.   It is my first ENDLESS WALKER,  

Was a lot of fun for an hour or two.  Rather easy.  A steal when on sale.  

Graphics are really nice and a few good scares.

EDIT: The update with the flamethrower is cool. It seems the game is way harder since the Update

reviews.review_title: What an amazing and unique experience
reviews.review_description:
I was never a fan of all these Endless Runner mobile games, so I was a bit skeptical if this one is fun, especially in VR. Hell yeah it is! It's spooky, (not too) challenging with great graphics in an awesome Horror/Sci-Fi setting. Definitely worth your money!

On the more technical side, it works like a charm on my GearVR with a Samsung Galaxy S8. No performance issues at all.
Very fun and challenging.  I still jump when the phantoms run at me.  Great game that's worth it.
This game is great and gives you quite the scares some times i highly recommend this game
This game is sick! Great design with the checkpoint system!
Nice game. Very intensive. Best quality sound I have heard on the Go.

The game itself has nice graphics and sound. The controls are pretty good (let your flashlight be your guide). I like this game. The reason for 4 stars and not 5 is it gets a bit repetitive. I realize the Go has its limitations, but it would be nice if there was greater variety in the progression levels. I feel like the traps are the same just in different places same goes for the ghouls. It has an occasional scare in the cut sequences which I expected after I got into playing a few levels. One later cutscene did get me though. Overall I give it a recommendation because it is fun so go get and see for yourself!
This game is so fun its one of the best games on the Oculus Go. If i could I would give it 7/10

So this game is alot of fun and i had some back and forth via email about some things like leaderboards and other such stuff and he was quite honest and told me things are moving a bit slowly behind the scenes but its still being updated and being worked on so give this game and this dev a chance

[PLAYED ON QUEST] I must say for a Go game this is surprisingly close to the Quest standard. The graphics look good, nice lighting and effects ect. But don't think you'll have an advantage against the Go on the Quest. If you try ducking IRL under lasers you will die since the hitbox of the player stays the same. Although small things like being able to quickly dodge obstacles by moving IRL and being able to move the flashlight with full 6 degrees can be helpful. 
I'd suggest getting this if it's on sale though. Like other reviews are saying, this game can get repetitive and with all the pauses for a quick jumpscare, this game can get annoying during long playtimes. 
I managed to get this for only 79p from the halloween sale and if it's still on sale as you're reading this then I'd suggest that you 100% get this game.
The game is super cool scary. The only real problem is becomes repetitive. I am on level 40 and not sure how many levels but same views but faster speeds of obstacles. I would definitely recommend

reviews.review_title: Just stops short of being great
reviews.review_description:
I really liked the look of this from the video and screenshots. Unfortunately, those pretty much sum up the entire game.

I really liked the opening sequence in the stasis unit, but that ended up being the most impressive thing about the game. The game itself is well put together, atmospheric enough, the graphics are great and is fun for the first few minutes. But that initial enjoyment soon turns to boredom as the game starts to feel kind of bland. Once you have seen everything it has to offer (which happens within the first few minutes), it just seems to turn into an endless combination of all the elements you've already seen, just in different orders. 

If there was a lot more variety and challenge in the game it would be a much more rewarding experience with more longevity. What is there is very polished, but there's just not enough of it to keep me going - I keep waiting for something new but no, it's exactly the same stuff again and again and again. A bit like the repeating backgrounds in a Scrooby Doo chase scene. 

What is in there is really well-done and has the potential to be an amazing experience. But at the moment, overall, it's not quite there...

I have been playing since early beta. The game improve A LOT in this time. Its still developing but its very nice.. well no, isnt, its scary, its dark, you will die a lot, you will scream,  but with at some hours you will be driffting phantoms, lasers and fires like nothing and pray for more difficult rooms. Do you like to have fear? This is your game.

I'm not too into horror but this game keeps bringing me back, despite jumping every time a space zombie screams in my face! Awesome mechanics and really smooth gameplay, probably the best I've experienced on the Go. This game will definitely keep you trying for that next high score even if it scares the pants off of you. Highly recommended!
I was scared to try this game and admit I jumped more than a few times while playing but it is REALLY fun and addicting. So far I've made it to checkpoint 11

Game is pretty cool so far. warning you will need the patience of a Tibetan  monk at times  . other times you’ll have flashbacks of galaxy quest . Not so much of a fan of the flamethrower I think a shotgun with rock-salt would be perfect . I think that would effectively kill ghosts . And the big problem with the flamethrower is if you kill a ghost with a flamethrower and you just step on them a little bit you die to even if you try to avoid it  and other times when you try to get out of the way of stuff it’s like you’re a massive Hitbox  and I think the ability to duck would be awesome to keep the flow because I notice sometimes if you just stop running a little bit The red lasers will hit you because they speed up which is why I’m wondering if it’s a flow type thing because if you stop just a little bit you lose the speed that you had in those breakup points because you got to wait for those red lasers that go sideways —to go all the way up well trying to avoid the ones that go left and right quickly< |> and I really think it screws up the flow and I think ducking would solve this problem . but so far the game is really fun The monsters rock🤟🏻😎 so far every other horror games I played on here I’ve never seen monsters with so such detail

reviews.review_title: It is an ok game, not a great game.
reviews.review_description: Cheap to buy too...

Been beta testing this game, full review to follow when I get more time. So far I've loved the experience a new take on the endless runner genre. Great graphics and Controls, has a real Doom3 vibe to the styling which I love.

reviews.review_title: Needed new boxers at ones point
reviews.review_description: Loved this game, simple but very effective, not to easy though so enjoy the challenge, have had to slam on the poop brakes at some points in the game so that's a plus ( I think ) . Try this game, what have you got to lose.
Why are there so many 2 star reviews? This game is awesome(and terrifying)
